subcodes.first_line: O gentle breeze of dawn! Shouldst thou come upon the people of Bahá, recount unto them the tale of the Youth, that perchance they may arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نسیم الصبا ان رایت اهل البهاء و اقصص لهم قصص الغلام لعل یقومون علی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @music and singing, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
